query: direct on-camera flash snapshot harsh shadow red eye unflattering party
message: anti_aesthetics/lighting: harsh flash — direct on-camera flash, red-eye, party snapshot aesthetic, hard shadows, unflattering documentary realism

response.objective_caption: A black and white photograph of two children indoors. In the foreground, a boy wearing a white dress shirt, dark vest, and tie holds a cluster of balloons in one hand and a small trophy in the other. A girl with shoulder-length hair, glasses, and a patterned sleeveless dress stands behind him with her arms crossed. A table with a white tablecloth is visible in the background.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A black and white photograph rendered with heavy film grain and motion blur, showing a boy in formal wear in the foreground holding balloons and a trophy with his eyes closed, while a girl in a patterned dress stands behind him with crossed arms. Harsh flash lighting blows out highlights on the balloons and a nearby table while the background falls into crushed, impenetrable shadow. The composition carries an amateur snapshot energy, capturing an unposed, candid moment with lo-fi analog texture.
